title: Powder II — Thermal Falling-Sand
tagline: A falling-sand world that runs on heat.
blurb: 25+ materials with a real temperature system: melt, freeze, boil, burn, electrify, and detonate. Heat/cool tools, clone & emitter sources, 3 save slots.
whatsNew: Full temperature system: heat spreads cell-to-cell so things melt, freeze, boil and ignite
13 new materials incl. lava, ice, glass, gunpowder, nitro, salt/brine, seeds, metal+wire electricity
Heat & Cool tools plus a thermal (temperature) view overlay
Clone and Emitter source tools for infinite material fountains
3 localStorage save slots with RLE-compressed world snapshots
Brush shapes (circle / square / spray) and a live cell/temperature probe
